business.title: Bettors wagered $54 million on Khamenei’s death. Now they’re not getting paid. - The Washington Post

sports.title: Legendary football coach, commentator Lou Holtz dies at 89 - ESPN
sports.description: Lou Holtz, the quick-witted college football coach who led Notre Dame to a national championship in 1988 and burnished his reputation as a master at rebuilding programs, has died at the age of 89.

sports.title: Patriots releasing WR Stefon Diggs after one season - NFL.com
sports.description: The New England Patriots have informed WR Stefon Diggs that they will be releasing him after the start of the league year on March 11, NFL Network Insider Tom Pelissero reported Wednesday.

sports.description: The Chiefs have agreed to trade Trent McDuffie to the Rams when the new league year opens next week, but they weren't the only NFC team pursuing a deal for the cornerback.
